hooks.command: file_path=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$file_path" ] && echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css|md)$'; then npx prettier --write "$file_path" 2>/dev/null; fi

file_path=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$file_path" ] && echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '(\.env|\.env\..*)$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit .env files — add secrets manually' >&2; exit 2; fi
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || true
